name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Aren ESSENTIAL
Haze Pink Mini#Boston Pillow Bag
·Cp Exclusive®️ Monogram Full Print
Shoulder, Crossbody, Handheld
This mini Boston bag offers a fresh take on the classic style with a pale pink design, a high-end travel bag born during Munich's Golden Age. Made from classic Visetos material, it pays tribute to MCM's roots in travel. Its silhouette recalls a weekend bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. Exquisite craftsmanship, with the top handle hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted.
Model: H088
Size: 18*8*9.5cm
Strap: 102-118cm
Handle: Drop 8cm
Closure: Zipper
Color: Haze Pink/POWER PINK
